inputs.text: Award-winning interior design photography: a fully finished living room with sofa area, natural light from windows, designed in Scandinavian style — authentic Scandinavian interior: pale birch hardwood floors, painted white V-groove walls, low Hans Wegner-style sofa in light grey wool, sheepskin throw, Hay round oak coffee table, Iittala glass vases, single wishbone chair, paper IKEA-style globe pendant, Marimekko cushion accents, abundant natural light through large windows with linen curtains, lagom philosophy of just-enough. Completely transform this raw space: apply authentic wall finishes (paint, wallpaper, panels, plaster — appropriate to style), period-correct flooring (hardwood, tile, carpet, concrete — style-driven choice), proper ceiling treatment (smooth, beamed, coffered, exposed — depending on style), layered lighting (ambient, task, accent — style-driven fixtures), and furnish with comfortable sofa, armchair, ottoman with throw pillows, king or queen size bed with upholstered headboard, premium bedding and layered pillows, floor lamp, table lamps, wall sconces, ambient lighting. Visual aesthetic: high-end interior design magazine cover quality, AD Architectural Digest style, Elle Decor photography. Composition: balanced rule of thirds, professional staging, curated decor. Lighting: natural daylight from existing windows blended with ambient warm interior lighting, soft shadows, golden hour quality. Camera: wide-angle 24mm lens, eye-level perspective, sharp focus throughout, slight HDR. Quality: 8K ultra-detailed, photorealistic, hyperrealistic textures, natural materials with realistic micro-details, perfect lighting harmony, no AI artifacts. CRITICAL ARCHITECTURAL CONSTRAINT: Keep the EXACT same room shape, EXACT same proportions, EXACT same window positions and sizes, EXACT same door openings, EXACT same ceiling height, EXACT same camera perspective and angle as the source photo — modify ONLY interior design, surface materials, decorative finishes, and furniture placement.

modern style (when not requested), generic IKEA look, white minimalism (when not requested), changed room shape, moved windows, moved doors, different room size, different perspective, different camera angle, fisheye, distorted geometry, extra rooms added, walls removed, walls added, new openings, missing windows, cartoon, anime, illustration, painting, drawing, sketch, 3d render look, video game, low quality, blurry, soft focus, motion blur, lens flare, chromatic aberration, oversaturated colors, overprocessed HDR, watermark, signature, text, logo, deformed furniture, melting objects, floating objects, impossible geometry, duplicate windows, asymmetric mirroring, plastic-looking surfaces, fake-looking materials
